KayakReserve SUP

Home · Sea glide

Adriatic SUP sessions calibrated for luminous mornings

Paddleboarding keeps pulse rates lyrical—ideal after high-octane canyon mornings or marathon drives from Split Airport. Transparent boards optional, buoyancy aids gladly supplied, itineraries emphasise sea caves photographers obsess over plus swimmable pockets families adore.

Blending terrestrial highlights

Stack mellow coastal paddles atop guided buggy ridges or ATV afternoons for “active holidays Croatia” storytelling. Mention shoulder-season breezes—we adjust launch azimuths for silky water.

Ready for mellow salt spray? Sync boards with concierge before peak July slots evaporate.
